title: rosa coriifolia subvar. oblonga
intro: Rosa coriifolia subvar. oblonga, also known as the Indian rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. Traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant is said to possess several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and acting as an antiseptic and antibacterial agent. Rosa coriifolia subvar. oblonga can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
